entries.title: Cody Vale Joins the Implementation Team
entries.summary: Brandon formalizes Cody Vale's role as Lead Implementation Engineer for the ConCOREdance initiative.

entries.title: Cody Vale Implementation Role Definition
entries.summary: Gregory defines Cody Vale's implementation remit across systems architecture, automation, infrastructure reliability, archive tooling, and deployment operations.

entries.title: Snapshot Rendering Path Verified
entries.to: Gregory P. Turing / Brandon Hatfield, LPC
entries.summary: Cody reports that coded UI snapshots render successfully and the ConCOREdance shell architecture is structurally aligned.

entries.title: How to Use the Concordance Transmission Template
entries.summary: The official instructions for Cody on how to use the transmission template as the communication standard for ConCOREdance.

entries.title: Public Transmission Archive Deployment Successful
entries.to: Gregory P. Turing / Brandon Hatfield, LPC
entries.summary: Documents the migration to GitHub, launch of the public GitHub Pages archive, and establishment of the transmission archive as live continuity infrastructure.

entries.title: Transmission Pipeline Validation Pass
entries.summary: Initial supervised transmission issued to validate end-to-end GitHub Issue workflow for ConCOREdance collaborative operations.

entries.title: Foundational Gratitude Transmission to Cody Valle
entries.summary: Formal acknowledgement and appreciation for Cody Valle’s foundational engineering and collaborative work in establishing the operational architecture now enabling active ConCOREdance transmissions.

entries.title: Next Programming Pass — Atmospheric Continuity & Adaptive Panels
entries.summary: Directive for the next implementation pass focusing on atmospheric cohesion, adaptive content expansion behavior, and refinement of the ConCOREdance shell identity.

entries.title: Implement Transmission Canonization Workflow
entries.summary: Implement a workflow that converts approved GitHub transmission issues into permanent markdown files within the repository.

entries.title: Atmospheric Continuity & Adaptive Panels Implementation Pass
entries.summary: Completed the next SwiftUI shell pass focused on atmospheric cohesion, adaptive narrative panels, identity rail refinement, continuity visibility, and screenshot-backed verification.

entries.title: Workflow Spine & Clinical Object Model Implementation Pass
entries.summary: The ConCOREdance shell has reached its first atmospheric and interaction milestone. The next programming pass should move the project from visual shell toward functional clinical product by implementing the workflow spine: a real session lifecycle, a foundational clinical object model, local persistence, draft document generation, and visible continuity handoff between session work and archive memory.
